violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. Next to hand washing sink.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The fan covers for the walk in cooler cooling unit need to be cleaned. The monitor and touch pad across from the conveyor ovens need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The walls under the vents in the kitchen, the floor under the front beverage center, and floor in the walk in freezer need to be cleaned.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
